name: Hong Gil-dong
headline: Senior Data Platform Engineer
summary: Data platform engineer who builds reliable ingestion, orchestration, warehouse, and data quality foundations for analytics and ML teams. I focus on creating standards and operating practices that let multiple teams work from the same trustworthy data model without losing delivery speed.

bullets: Designed orchestration and data quality checks for batch and streaming pipelines so analytics teams could rely on shared reference data.
Introduced dbt modeling standards and reusable validation workflows that raised the safety of warehouse changes across teams.
Partnered with ML teams on feature pipeline reliability and freshness monitoring to keep downstream model inputs stable.
Built product event ingestion paths and warehouse marts used for business and product reporting.
Maintained Airflow DAGs, Spark jobs, and schema change operating procedures with multiple stakeholder teams.

projects.name: Warehouse Quality Guardrails
projects.subtitle: Automated checks for ingestion and marts
bullets: Added freshness alerts and lineage-aware validation for critical marts so data quality issues surfaced earlier.
Caught schema drift before scheduled transformations ran, which reduced broken downstream dashboards and ad hoc recovery work.
